brand_colors.note: The website uses amber (#C8A050) as its accent. The actual brand assets use a deeper red (#8B2332) with gold (#C4943A). Consider adding the red as a secondary accent — it's prominent in all illustrations and the star logo.

logos.description: Primary star burst logo — deep red 12-point star with gold serif 'R'. Use as favicon, social avatar, watermark.
Revival Forever wordmark with intertwined snake. Red and black striped snake, gold star accent. Horizontal layout.
Snake illustration only (no text) from the Revival Forever mark. Red and black stripes.
Current website logo (already in repo). Used in nav, footer, hero.

illustrations.description: Woman in red dress seated on bar stool, holding rose, cocktail in hand, gazing at crescent moon and stars. Ink line art with red accents.
illustrations.style: Black ink + red accent on white

illustrations.description: Hand emerging from smoke/clouds holding an old fashioned glass with red cocktail and garnish.
illustrations.style: Black ink + red accent on white

illustrations.description: Close-up of an old fashioned cocktail in a crystal glass with cherry garnish and citrus peel. Red liquid, decorative glass pattern.
illustrations.style: Black ink + red accent on white

illustrations.description: Man in vintage suit with red tie, relaxed on ground holding coupe glass, with a snake nearby. Prohibition-era vibe.
illustrations.style: Black ink + red accent on white

illustrations.description: 1920s flapper woman in red dress standing at fishbowl on ornate table, art deco style.
illustrations.style: Black ink + red accent on white

illustrations.description: Crescent moon face with all-seeing eye holding a goblet filled with red cocktail. Mystical/occult aesthetic.
illustrations.style: Black ink + red accent on white

illustrations.description: Two men in 1920s suits holding bottles, all-seeing eye pyramid behind them. Red triangle and eye, red puddle at feet.
illustrations.style: Black ink + red accent on white

merch_assets.description: Keychain design — 'Revival / House of Spirits' with snake wrapped around martini glass, stars and moons.
Keychain design — 'Revival / Pick Your Poison' with snake wrapped around martini glass, stars and moons.
Palmistry hand illustration with snake, star logo, and 'Purveyors of Fine Spirits / Revival' text. Dark background with gold stars.

coaster_designs.note: 6 coaster designs in PDF (print-ready) plus 6 draft PNGs. Could be featured on the merch page or gallery.

stickers.note: Older design generation with different color palette (teal/purple). May be legacy. Verify with Ryan if these should appear on the site.

deployment_notes.image_optimization: All PNGs should be converted to WebP for the website. Use Next.js Image component with width/height for CLS prevention.

suggested_public_structure./public/images/logos/: Star Logo, Revival Forever wordmark, Revival Forever snake

deployment_notes.transparent_backgrounds: Most illustrations and logos have white/transparent backgrounds. For the dark website theme, either: (a) invert/process to work on dark backgrounds, or (b) display in light-colored containers/cards.
